九死一生回到都市的赵纯良，还没来得及享受美好的人生，就意外的接到了来自家里的任务。为了能够顺利完成任务，赵纯良化身化妆品公司小保安队长。本以为轻松的任务，却没想到牵扯出了莫大的阴谋。且看保安队长赵纯良如何横行于美女如云的化妆品公司，如何从一个小小的保安队长，成长为商界大亨，乃至纵横世界的绝世枭雄。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2f48db1d47ef4b2faccbd0c6750bc81b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"老施","author_id":"","book_id":"7221520719102872615","book_name":"钞能力！有钱人的快乐你懂？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7223213390381580856","read_count":"659","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5978592"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"1947","tags":"都市种田,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2f48db1d47ef4b2faccbd0c6750bc81b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253738&x-signature=shLAY9wP7wshrea0TlAKAG205NA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2937548730283636","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113085866022DC724D7D68F7AE0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3957},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"737
